mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.code = T.code AND E.country_code = T.country_code WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT T.code AS code ,T.country_code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%Y-%m-%d') AS publicationDate ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%H:%i') AS publicationTime ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%w') AS dayOfWeek ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.code = T.code AND E.country_code = T.country_code INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = T.country_code WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY T.publication
ORDER BY T.publication DESC
LIMIT 0, #{size} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT T.code AS code ,T.country_code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%Y-%m-%d') AS publicationDate ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%H:%i') AS publicationTime ,DATE_FORMAT(T.publication, '%w') AS dayOfWeek ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.code = T.code AND E.country_code = T.country_code INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = T.country_code WHERE T.code = #{code} AND T.country_code = #{countryCode} AND T.publication = #{publication}

SELECT T.code AS code ,T.country_code AS countryCode ,E.importance AS importance ,C.name AS countryName ,C.name_short AS countryNameShort ,E.name AS name ,E.description AS description ,T.publication AS publication ,T.sub_title AS subTitle ,T.result_value AS resultValue ,T.forecast_value AS forecastValue ,T.previous_value AS previousValue ,E.unit_of_value AS unitOfValue ,T.memo AS memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data T INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator E ON E.code = T.code AND E.country_code = T.country_code INNER JOIN fx_country C ON C.code = T.country_code INNER JOIN fx_economic_indicator_data_load L ON T.code = L.code AND T.country_code = L.country_code AND T.publication = L.publication WHERE T.result_value != L.result_value OR T.forecast_value != L.forecast_value OR T.previous_value != L.previous_value
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_economic_indicator_data SELECT L.code ,L.country_code ,L.publication ,L.sub_title ,L.result_value ,L.forecast_value ,L.previous_value ,L.memo FROM fx_economic_indicator_data_load L LEFT JOIN fx_economic_indicator_data D ON D.code = L.code AND D.country_code = L.country_code AND D.publication = L.publication WHERE D.code IS NULL
